class.name: VideoStreamNative
class.brief_description: Video stream decoded by the host operating system's native media APIs.
class.description: Holds a compressed video container (WebM/MP4/MKV) and plays it back through whichever OS-native decoder ships on the build platform. The decoder is asked for NV12 frames; YCbCr-to-RGB conversion runs on the GPU via the compute shader [code]ycbcr_sampler.glsl[/code] (Vulkan / D3D12 / Metal) or [code]ycbcr_sampler_compat.gdshader[/code] (OpenGL Compatibility). No CPU per-pixel work — designed for 8K content at multiple-screen scale. Use with [VideoStreamPlayer] like any other [VideoStream] resource. If no native backend is installed at runtime, [method VideoStreamPlayer.get_video_texture] returns a 1x1 black placeholder texture.

method.name: load_from_buffer
method.description: Creates a new [VideoStreamNative] from an in-memory container buffer. [param hint] uses the same enum as [AudioStreamNative].

method.name: load_from_file
method.description: Reads the file at [param path] into memory and calls [method load_from_buffer].

members.member: Container-format hint for the OS decoder.
Raw bytes of the compressed container.
